BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: FUTURE BUSINESS LEADERS OF AMERICA GROUP

IRS990.ActivityOrMissionDesc: INSPIRES AND PREPARES STUDENTS TO BECOME COMMUNITY-MINDED BUSINESS LEADERS IN A GLOBAL SOCIETY THROUGH RELEVANT CAREER PREPARATION AND LEADERSHIP EXPERIENCES.
IRS990.MissionDesc: OUR MISSION IS TO INSPIRE AND PREPARE STUDENTS TO BECOME COMMUNITY-MINDED BUSINESS LEADERS IN A GLOBAL SOCIETY THROUGH RELEVANT CAREER PREPARATION AND LEADERSHIP EXPERIENCES.
IRS990.Desc: A PROGRAM DESIGNED TO EDUCATE THE YOUTH OF AMERICA TO UNDERSTAND THE BUSINESS PHILOSOPHY OF OUR ECONOMY FOR FUTURE PARTICIPATION IN SERVICING ITS NEEDS AND TO FURTHER THE DEVELOPMENT OF INDIVIDUAL LEADERSHIP QUALITIES.

BusinessName.BusinessNameLine1Txt: MARY AIT

Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: SCHEDULE A, PART III, LINE 12, EXPLANATION OF OTHER INCOME:
Form990ScheduleAPartVIGrp.ExplanationTxt: MISCELLANEOUS REVENUE - 2013 AMOUNT: $ 122,444. 2014 AMOUNT: $ 96,685. 2015 AMOUNT: $ 110,236. 2016 AMOUNT: $ 149,810. 2017 AMOUNT: $ 144,050.

SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: PROCEDURES FOR MONITORING THE USE OF GRANT FUNDS IN THE U.S.: THE CHAPTERS MAKE AWARDS AND SCHOLARSHIPS DIRECTLY TO STUDENTS IN THE UNITED STATES.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 6
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: MEMBERS THE MEMBERS OF FBLA-PBL ARE STUDENTS WHO ELECT THE STUDENT REPRESENTATIVES OF THE GOVERNING BODY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION A, LINE 7A
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: MEMBERS POWER TO ELECT THE MEMBERS OF FBLA-PBL ARE STUDENTS WHO ELECT THE STUDENT REPRESENTATIVES OF THE GOVERNING BODY.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 11B
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: REVIEW PROCESS OF FORM 990 THE 990 IS PREPARED BY AN INDEPENDENT ACCOUNTING FIRM AND REVIEWED BY THE ACCOUNTING DEPARTMENT, CEO AND PRESIDENT.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION B, LINE 12C
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY ACKNOWLEDGEMENT AND DISCLOSURE FORMS ARE SIGNED ANNUALLY BY THE NATIONAL BOARD OF DIRECTORS AND NATIONAL HEADQUARTERS STAFF.

SupplementalInformationDetail.FormAndLineReferenceDesc: FORM 990, PART VI, SECTION C, LINE 19
SupplementalInformationDetail.ExplanationTxt: AVAILABILITY OF CERTAIN DOCUMENTS THE ORGANIZATION'S GOVERNING DOCUMENTS, CONFLICT OF INTEREST POLICY, AND FORM 990 ARE AVAILABLE TO THE PUBLIC UPON WRITTEN REQUEST.
CHANGES IN NET ASSETS RESULTS FROM FLUCTUATION OF THE CHAPTERS INCLUDED IN THIS GROUP RETURN BASED ON ACTIVITY LEVEL. 12,344.
